scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm ci && cd ../client && npm ci
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npx prisma generate && npm run build && cp -r dist/ ../ && cp -r node_modules/ ../ && cp -r prisma/ ../ && cp start.sh ../ && mkdir -p ../dist/public && cp -r ../client/dist/* ../dist/public/
